creator: n@nectar.com
text:
The MASTER_SITE list in ports/lang/squeak/Makefile is incorrect, which
is why
the distribution is unfetchable.  Check e.g. alix.inria.fr for Squeak
1.18.

A correct MASTER_SITES entry would be:

MASTER_SITES= ftp://alix.inria.fr/pub/squeak/unix/ \
              ftp://st.cs.uiuc.edu/pub/Smalltalk/Squeak/unix/ \
              http://st-www.cs.uiuc.edu/ftp/Smalltalk/Squeak/ \
             
ftp://uiarchive.cso.uiuc.edu/pub/lang/smalltalk/smalltalk/Squeak/ \
             
http://wuarchive.wustl.edu/languages/smalltalk/smalltalk/Squeak/ \
             
ftp://ftp.cs.uni-magdeburg.de/pub/Smalltalk/Smalltalk/Squeak/

Incidently, this port (of Squeak V1) should really be updated to the
last
release of Squeak V1, which was 1.31.

Are you no longer interested in maintaining this port, Roland?
-- 
Jacques Vidrine / n@nectar.com / nectar@FreeBSD.org
